mapper.sql:
p.PAGE_ID AS pageId, p.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, p.VIEW_MODE AS viewMode, p.APPROVE_STATE AS approveState,
CASE WHEN p.PAGE_HTML IS NOT NULL AND DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(p.PAGE_HTML) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hasFile, CASE WHEN p.EXPIRED_DATE IS NOT NULL AND p.EXPIRED_DATE < SYSDATE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isExpired, TO_CHAR(p.BEGINNING_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS beginningDate, TO_CHAR(p.EXPIRED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expiredDate, p.REJECTED_REASON AS rejectedReason, TO_CHAR(p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastModifiedDtime

choose.when: ORDER BY p.PAGE_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.VIEW_MODE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.APPROVE_STATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.BEGINNING_DATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.EXPIRED_DATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SPW_CMS_PAGE ( PAGE_ID, PAGE_NAME, VIEW_MODE, TEMPLATE_ID, PAGE_HTML, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_USER_NAME, LAST_MODIFIER_ID, LAST_MODIFIER_NAME, APPROVE_STATE, USE_YN, CREATE_DATE, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME ) VALUES ( #{pageId}, #{pageName}, #{viewMode}, #{templateId},
(SELECT PAGE_HTML FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{templateId}), #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userId}, #{userName}, 'WORK', 'Y', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, PAGE_NAME AS pageName, VIEW_MODE AS viewMode FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_TYPE = 'TEMPLATE' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PAGE_NAME
SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, PAGE_NAME AS pageName, VIEW_MODE AS viewMode FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{templateId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'TEMPLATE' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{templateId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'TEMPLATE' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT USER_NAME FROM FWK_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{approverId} AND USER_STATE_CODE = '1'
mapper.update:
UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET APPROVE_STATE = 'PENDING', APPROVER_ID = #{approverId}, APPROVER_NAME = #{approverName},
BEGINNING_DATE = CASE WHEN #{beginningDate} IS NOT NULL THEN TO_DATE(#{beginningDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE NULL END, EXPIRED_DATE = CASE WHEN #{expiredDate} IS NOT NULL THEN TO_DATE(#{expiredDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE NULL END, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{userId}, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND APPROVE_STATE IN ('WORK', 'REJECTED', 'APPROVED')
